main.description: Revoke a previously-recorded subject_actions row. Sets revoked_at / revoked_by_did / revoked_reason on the original row (the no-update-except-revoke trigger from the §F20 schema permits exactly this NULL→non-NULL transition); recomputes subject_strike_state with the revoked action's strikes excluded; writes a hash-chained audit_log row. All in a single transaction.

actionId.description: Primary key of the subject_actions row to revoke.

reason.description: Optional moderator-facing rationale. Stored on the row's revoked_reason column; surfaces in subsequent history fetches.

actionId.description: The revoked row's id (echoed for confirmation).

revokedAt.description: RFC-3339 wall-clock the revocation took effect.

errors.name: ActionNotFound
errors.description: No subject_actions row with the given actionId exists.

errors.name: ActionAlreadyRevoked
errors.description: The row's revoked_at column is already non-NULL. The schema trigger forbids re-revocation; the recorder surfaces it as this error before attempting the UPDATE.
